name: zforge
description: Template-aware development workflow: interactive planning, multi-reviewer code review, progress tracking, and autonomous multi-phase feature orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Template-aware planning, review, and orchestration workflows.
interface.longDescription: zforge bundles reusable skills and workflow templates for planning, tracking, reviewing, and orchestrating multi-phase engineering work.
defaultPrompt: Use zforge to plan this feature.
Use zforge to review this implementation.
Use zforge to resume this feature plan.
